# The Aesthetic Brief — 2026-07-21

9 new item(s) worth your 5 minutes, grouped by category, most relevant first.

## Clinical / Treatment Trends

### Medik8 Expands North American Retail Presence Through Sephora Partnership
*Global Cosmetics News · Canada · ★★★☆☆*

British clinical skincare brand Medik8 has expanded its North American footprint through a major retail partnership with Sephora, launching online and rolling out to stores across the US and Canada.

[Read more](https://www.globalcosmeticsnews.com/medik8-expands-north-american-retail-presence-through-sephora-partnership/)
